error_signature: Loop Over Items does not continue after first iteration
title: Loop Over Items not processing all messages
symptom: The Loop Over Items node only processes the first item in the input array and does not continue to subsequent items.
applies_when: Input is an array of items
not_this_if: Loop Over Items node is correctly connected to the previous node's output
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node requires a proper connection from the previous node's output to its input to iterate through all items. If the connection is missing, it will only process the first item.
fix_steps: Connect the output of the last node to the input of the Loop Over Items node
agent_instruction: Ensure the Loop Over Items node is connected to the previous node's output.
